title: GATE 2026 Final Answer Key Out: Download Official PDF Now

detail.title: GATE 2026 Final Answer Key Out: Download Official PDF Now
detail.short_info: GATE 2026 Final Answer Key released by IIT Guwahati on March 16. Download from GOAPS portal using Enrollment ID. Check response sheet, calculate scores, objection updates, results date & FAQs for M.Tech, PSUs.

sections.heading: GATE 2026 Final Answer Key Out: Download Official PDF Now

content.text: The GATE 2026 Final Answer Key is out as of March 16, 2026, released by IIT Guwahati after reviewing objections. Candidates can now access it via the GOAPS portal to verify answers and estimate scores for M.Tech admissions and PSU recruitments. Download yours today using the direct link below.
This table summarizes key details for quick reference.

rows: 30 papers (AE, AG, AR, BM, BT, CE, CH, CS, etc.) ​

content.text: Use this to cross-check your performance across subjects like Civil Engineering (CE) or Computer Science (CS).

sections.heading: How to Download GATE 2026 Final Answer Key

content.text: Follow these simple steps to access your answer key and response sheet.

items: Visit the official GOAPS portal: Click Here.
Enter your Enrollment ID and Password (from GATE 2026 application).
Click "Login" and select the relevant paper/session.
Download the Final Answer Key PDF and your Response Sheet.
Compare responses to calculate raw scores.

content.text: No eligibility restrictions apply—all appeared candidates can access it post-exam.
Calculate your GATE score using the formula: Raw Score = (MCQ marks) + (MSQ/Numerical marks), adjusted for negatives (-1/3 for 1-mark MCQs, -2/3 for 2-mark MCQs).

items: Match your response sheet against the final key.
Note changes from objections (refunds issued for valid ones at ₹500 each).
Use online rank predictors from coaching sites for estimates.

content.text: This helps predict All India Rank for IITs, NITs, or PSUs like BHEL.

sections.heading: Official Links for GATE 2026 Answer Key & Response Sheet

items: GOAPS Login (Primary): Click Here​
GATE 2026 Official Site: Click Here​
Subject-wise PDFs (e.g., CS, ME, CE): Available post-login; check coaching sites like MADE EASY for solutions​

content.text: Avoid unofficial sources to prevent discrepancies.

Results declare on March 19, 2026, via GOAPS—download scorecards then. Post-results, apply for M.Tech via CCMT or COAP, and PSUs (e.g., BHEL recruitments). Prepare documents like scorecard, degree certificates for admissions.
